title: gjc-app-server wire protocol
description: Rust-derived JSON Schema for the codex-compatible app-server wire surface.

RequestId.description: Opaque JSON-RPC request id (string or number), preserved verbatim so responses echo the exact client id.

Response.title: Response
Response.description: An outbound response: exactly one of `result`/`error` is present.

AppServerError.description: A structured error that maps directly onto a JSON-RPC error object.

RequestId.description: Opaque JSON-RPC request id (string or number), preserved verbatim so responses echo the exact client id.

RequestId.title: RequestId
RequestId.description: Opaque JSON-RPC request id (string or number), preserved verbatim so responses echo the exact client id.

AppServerError.title: AppServerError
AppServerError.description: A structured error that maps directly onto a JSON-RPC error object.

ThreadIdentity.title: ThreadIdentity
ThreadIdentity.description: Immutable identity + mutable metadata + current backend generation.

SessionMetadata.description: Mutable TS-side session metadata attached to an immutable thread identity.

ThreadStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a thread in the registry.

ThreadStatus.title: ThreadStatus
ThreadStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a thread in the registry.

SessionMetadata.title: SessionMetadata
SessionMetadata.description: Mutable TS-side session metadata attached to an immutable thread identity.

TerminalCause.title: TerminalCause
TerminalCause.description: Terminal cause for a turn. Priority: `Failed` > `Interrupted` > `Completed`.

EmptyResult.title: EmptyResult
EmptyResult.description: Empty object result used by `gjc/todos/set`, `gjc/hostTools/*`, `thread/delete`, and `thread/archive`; see `server.rs` handlers returning `json!({})`.

InitializedParams.title: InitializedParams
InitializedParams.description: Client `initialized` notification params; `server.rs::dispatch` only checks the method.

ThreadResumeParams.title: ThreadResumeParams
ThreadResumeParams.description: `thread/resume` params require `threadId` and otherwise pass through to the backend; see `server.rs::handle_thread_resume`.

ThreadSummary.title: ThreadSummary
ThreadSummary.description: Thread object returned by start/resume/fork/read; see `server.rs::register`, `thread_response`, and `handle_thread_read`.

ThreadStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a thread in the registry.
Lifecycle status of a thread in the registry.

ThreadSummary.description: Thread object returned by start/resume/fork/read; see `server.rs::register`, `thread_response`, and `handle_thread_read`.

ThreadStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a thread in the registry.

ThreadSummary.description: Thread object returned by start/resume/fork/read; see `server.rs::register`, `thread_response`, and `handle_thread_read`.

ThreadStatus.description: Lifecycle status of a thread in the registry.

ThreadSummary.description: Thread object returned by start/resume/fork/read; see `server.rs::register`, `thread_response`, and `handle_thread_read`.

TurnStartParams.title: TurnStartParams
TurnStartParams.description: `turn/start` params require `threadId`, optionally `expectedTurnId`, and are then forwarded to `AgentBackend::prompt`; see `server.rs::handle_turn_start`.

TurnSteerParams.title: TurnStartParams
TurnSteerParams.description: `turn/start` params require `threadId`, optionally `expectedTurnId`, and are then forwarded to `AgentBackend::prompt`; see `server.rs::handle_turn_start`.

TurnInterruptResult.title: EmptyResult
TurnInterruptResult.description: Empty object result used by `gjc/todos/set`, `gjc/hostTools/*`, `thread/delete`, and `thread/archive`; see `server.rs` handlers returning `json!({})`.

ExtensionDescriptor.title: ExtensionDescriptor
ExtensionDescriptor.description: Extension descriptor returned by `gjc/extensions/list` and inspect.
Extension descriptor returned by `gjc/extensions/list` and inspect.
Extension descriptor returned by `gjc/extensions/list` and inspect.

PluginDescriptor.title: PluginDescriptor
PluginDescriptor.description: Plugin descriptor returned by `gjc/plugins/list` and inspect.
Plugin descriptor returned by `gjc/plugins/list` and inspect.
Plugin descriptor returned by `gjc/plugins/list` and inspect.
Plugin descriptor returned by `gjc/plugins/list` and inspect.

GjcTodosSetResult.title: EmptyResult
GjcTodosSetResult.description: Empty object result used by `gjc/todos/set`, `gjc/hostTools/*`, `thread/delete`, and `thread/archive`; see `server.rs` handlers returning `json!({})`.

HostToolDescriptor.title: HostToolDescriptor
HostToolDescriptor.description: Host tool descriptor consumed by `gjc/hostTools/set`; see `host_tools.rs::parse_set_params`.
Host tool descriptor consumed by `gjc/hostTools/set`; see `host_tools.rs::parse_set_params`.

GjcHostToolsSetResult.title: EmptyResult
GjcHostToolsSetResult.description: Empty object result used by `gjc/todos/set`, `gjc/hostTools/*`, `thread/delete`, and `thread/archive`; see `server.rs` handlers returning `json!({})`.

GjcHostToolsResultParams.title: GjcHostToolsResultParams
GjcHostToolsResultParams.description: `gjc/hostTools/result` params and backend result shape; see `host_tools.rs::parse_result_params`.

GjcHostToolsResultResult.title: EmptyResult
GjcHostToolsResultResult.description: Empty object result used by `gjc/todos/set`, `gjc/hostTools/*`, `thread/delete`, and `thread/archive`; see `server.rs` handlers returning `json!({})`.

GjcHostToolsUpdateResult.title: EmptyResult
GjcHostToolsUpdateResult.description: Empty object result used by `gjc/todos/set`, `gjc/hostTools/*`, `thread/delete`, and `thread/archive`; see `server.rs` handlers returning `json!({})`.

ThreadEventBase.title: ThreadEventBase
ThreadEventBase.description: Common thread-scoped notification fields inserted by `event_map.rs::ThreadStream::note`.

ItemStartedParams.title: ItemStartedParams
ItemStartedParams.description: `item/started` notification params emitted by `event_map.rs::on_event` for messages, reasoning, compaction, and tools.

ItemAgentMessageDeltaParams.title: ItemAgentMessageDeltaParams
ItemAgentMessageDeltaParams.description: `item/agentMessage/delta` notification params emitted by `event_map.rs::on_event` for text deltas.

ItemCompletedParams.title: ItemCompletedParams
ItemCompletedParams.description: `item/completed` notification params emitted by `event_map.rs::complete_message_item` and tool completion mapping.

GjcEventParams.title: GjcEventParams
GjcEventParams.description: `gjc/event` notification params emitted after every backend event by `event_map.rs::raw`.

ServerNotificationEnvelope.title: ServerNotificationEnvelope
ServerNotificationEnvelope.description: Method-specific server notification envelopes for GUI-consumed events; see `event_map.rs`, host-tool, host-URI, and workflow-gate notification emitters in `server.rs`.

GjcEventParams.description: `gjc/event` notification params emitted after every backend event by `event_map.rs::raw`.

ItemAgentMessageDeltaParams.description: `item/agentMessage/delta` notification params emitted by `event_map.rs::on_event` for text deltas.

ItemCompletedParams.description: `item/completed` notification params emitted by `event_map.rs::complete_message_item` and tool completion mapping.

ItemStartedParams.description: `item/started` notification params emitted by `event_map.rs::on_event` for messages, reasoning, compaction, and tools.
